title: Princess Mononoke
tmdbOverview: Ashitaka, a prince of the disappearing Emishi people, is cursed by a demonized boar god and must journey to the west to find a cure. Along the way, he encounters San, a young human woman fighting to protect the forest, and Lady Eboshi, who is trying to destroy it. Ashitaka must find a way to bring balance to this conflict.
synopsis: Released in 1997, Princess Mononoke is a adventure, fantasy and animation film from Japan. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.3 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 1990s and genre rankings. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
